name: Romaine Red Onion & Fennel Salad with Tart Li
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cup Fennel bulb, shredded (about 1 large bulb)
recipeInstructions:
SALAD:
1. Wash and dry the Romaine lettuce.
2. Tear the lettuce into bite-sized pieces.
3. Arrange the lettuce pieces in a salad bowl.
4. Toss with shredded fennel, cauliflower leaves, and red onion.
5. Prepare the Tart Lime Dressing by combining all ingredients.
6. Drizzle the dressing over the salad just before serving.
7. Toss to coat evenly.
TART LIME DRESSING:
1. Combine lemon juice, olive oil, minced garlic, salt, ground pepper, and paprika in a small bowl.
2. Mix well until fully combined.
